stance: independent, evidence-only; a different conclusion is invited where runtime evidence supports it

aura_birth_alarm.what_it_proves_at_source: a deterministic, phrase-blind, public-genesis-seeded VISUAL echo of identity — its own header (lines 12-16) declares 'the public key + signed receipt chain are the identity … never signs, never proves a person, and is not a machine-readable identifier'. It proves the DISPLAY layer exists and is byte-deterministic per seed; it proves NOTHING at the authority layer.
aura_birth_alarm.reachable_wired: WIRED — apps/spatial/app/aura.js:21 imports mountAuraBirth; :115-116 mounts it on a canvas when a genesis ref is present (mode:'base').
aura_birth_alarm.tested: NOT unit-tested — no aura-birth test exists; apps/spatial/test/transplant.test.mjs does not reference it. It is a WebGL/THREE.js visual (hard to unit-test); its guarantee is provenance (VERBATIM blob + sha256), not a behavioral vector.
aura_birth_alarm.re_port: DO NOT re-port (exact donor blob, already VERBATIM). No action proposed.
